workloads.name: p1 capability introspection contract
workloads.description: Comparable contract workload for adapter/device/instance capability introspection and free-members lifecycle checks.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P1 capability APIs with fixed Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf baseline filter and per-command normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable P1 capability contract: normalize as a per-command introspection sequence.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7

workloads.name: p2 lifecycle/refcount contract
workloads.description: Comparable contract workload for AddRef lifecycle touch coverage across core object classes.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P2 lifecycle APIs with balanced AddRef/release paths and a fixed DrawCallPerf baseline filter.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable P2 lifecycle contract: normalize as a single balanced addref/release sequence.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
p50Percent=-5664209.659934 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-5664209.659934 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: p1 capability introspection macro (500)
workloads.description: Comparable macro capability workload repeating capability introspection 500 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable macro profile for capability API hot-path overhead with fixed in-command iteration count and per-iteration normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable macro capability contract: normalize per internal introspection iteration.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7

workloads.name: p2 lifecycle/refcount macro (200)
workloads.description: Comparable macro lifecycle workload repeating AddRef touch coverage 200 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable macro profile for AddRef/refcount touch overhead with balanced release paths.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable macro lifecycle contract: normalize per internal AddRef touch iteration.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
p50Percent=-1145843.194356 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-1145843.194356 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: p0 resource lifecycle contract
workloads.description: Comparable contract workload for upload-buffer resize churn plus explicit barrier submission.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P0 lifecycle APIs with fixed Dawn BufferUploadPerf 4MB WriteBuffer baseline and per-iteration normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable lifecycle contract: normalize per command-sequence iteration over upload resize + barrier operations.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7

workloads.name: p0 compute indirect/timestamp contract
workloads.description: Comparable compute contract workload for async pipeline creation, indirect dispatch, and timestamp/query APIs.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P0 compute APIs with fixed Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf atomic baseline and per-dispatch normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable compute contract: command repeat=20 and kernel repeat=256 are normalized to per-dispatch units (20*256).

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7

workloads.name: p0 render multidraw contract
workloads.description: Comparable render-pass workload focused on occlusion/timestamp query wiring and multidraw API path gating.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P0 render APIs with fixed Dawn DrawCallPerf baseline filter and per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable render contract: normalize per draw over a render-pass drawCount=2000 stream.

reasons: left timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 1 is below claim floor 7
p50Percent=-277.950304 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-277.950304 is not positive (positive means left faster)

workloads.name: p0 render multidraw indexed contract
workloads.description: Comparable indexed render-pass workload for indexed multidraw API path gating and query wiring.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P0 render indexed APIs with fixed Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicVertexBuffer baseline filter and per-draw normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable indexed render contract: normalize per draw over drawCount=2000 indexed draws.
